scheme.title: Climate Data Hub Hazard Vocabulary
scheme.description: Controlled vocabulary of climate-related hazards used by the Climate Data Hub for metadata validation, filtering, and catalog rendering. Each concept is a friendly Hub name; where applicable, it carries an AGROVOC code and URI.

concepts.label: Drought
concepts.description: Extended period of unusually low water availability or precipitation deficit affecting agricultural, ecological, or water-resource systems.

concepts.label: Heat stress
concepts.description: Conditions where high temperature creates stress for crops, livestock, people, or ecosystems.

concepts.label: Cold stress
concepts.description: Conditions where low temperature creates stress for crops, livestock, people, or ecosystems.

concepts.label: Flooding
concepts.description: Temporary inundation of normally dry land from rainfall, river overflow, coastal water, or drainage failure.

concepts.label: Extreme precipitation
concepts.description: Rainfall or snowfall events with unusually high intensity or accumulation.

concepts.label: Tropical cyclone
concepts.description: Storm system with strong winds and heavy precipitation, including tropical storms, hurricanes, cyclones, and typhoons.

concepts.label: Wildfire
concepts.description: Uncontrolled fire in vegetation or agricultural landscapes with potential impacts on people, ecosystems, and assets.

concepts.label: Sea level rise
concepts.description: Increase in mean sea level that can affect coastal exposure, salinity, flooding, and erosion.

concepts.label: Salinization
concepts.description: Accumulation of salts in soil or water that can affect agricultural productivity, ecosystems, or water suitability.

concepts.label: Pest outbreak
concepts.description: Increase or spread of pest populations that can damage crops, livestock, forests, or stored products.

concepts.label: Disease outbreak
concepts.description: Increase or spread of disease affecting crops, livestock, people, or ecosystems.
